props.ChoiceText: You stayed too late among records, charters, and appeals, and by dawn knew more about the city than some men born to rule it.
props.ChoiceBio: A night in the archive taught you how much power sleeps quietly in paper.

0.TransitionText: Because a night in the archive taught you how much power sleeps quietly in paper, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.
